case_title: JEANNINE SOLANTO VS. MICRODYNE TECHNOLOGY, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,080.00 FILED BY SOLANTO, JEANNINE DBA FOUNDATION SYSTEMS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MICRODYNE TECHNOLOGY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-12-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOLANTO, JEANNINE DBA FOUNDATION SYSTEMS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MICRODYNE TECHNOLOGY, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-08-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MICRODYNE TECHNOLOGY, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-12-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-12-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-12-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOLANTO, JEANNINE DBA FOUNDATION SYSTEMS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MICRODYNE TECHNOLOGY, INC. $6,080.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,165.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS AN ORDER TO RETURN FUNDS ADVANCED BY PLAINTIFF TO DEFENDANT. THE JUDGMENT DOES NOT RELIEVE PLAINTIFF OF THE OBLIGATION TO PAY DEFENDANT IF AND WHEN PLAINTIFF IS PAID BY ITS CLIENTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MICRODYNE TECHNOLOGY, INC.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-02-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
